pi_items.source: Matches task description 'Edit the cylinder pressures for dive #4'
Matches task description 'Set the Start Pressure to 207 bar'
Matches task description 'and the End Pressure to 65 bar'
No verifier script exists to enforce or check this tolerance value
Parsed the actual downloaded SampleDivesV2.ssrf file which contains 29 <dive> elements
setup_task.sh script copies the sample data to this path

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real dive data from Subsurface's SampleDivesV2.ssrf. The expected log file is confirmed to be at /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf. The metadata claims an expected dive count of 8, but parsing the actual dataset reveals it contains 29 dives. Dive #4 currently has a cylinder without start and end pressures. The target start pressure (207 bar) and end pressure (65 bar) match the task description. The tolerance claim could not be verified as the scoring verifier script is missing from the task directory.
